Upload your team images and reference materials Step 3 - Provide design instructions for your athletic department banner PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Athletic Department Banners for Championship & Team Recognition Display

Due to the latest shipping regulations, all vinyl banners that exceed 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us to get a custom freight quote.

Make the most of your athletic department's achievements with eye-catching custom vinyl banners designed specifically for sports recognition and team pride. From championship celebrations and gymnasium displays to stadium installations and recruiting events, we help athletic departments improve their visibility and create memorable displays that honor team accomplishments.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver athletic department banners that you're proud to display in your facility. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with athletic departments to bring your team's vision to reality. One of the ways we do this is through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years. They're deeply familiar with the nuances of athletic banner design and are dedicated to collaborating to ensure you receive tailor-made banners that represent your teams with pride.

We offer a wide selection of custom athletic department banners and signage options, including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and flexible production times to ensure your banners are delivered when you need them for your sports seasons. Athletic departments can customize banners for team rosters, championship recognition, playoff achievements, and facility branding.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300, and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you with your athletic department banner needs.

Looking for something more specific? Custom sizing and specialty applications are available upon request! Ideal for special projects, unique gymnasium installations, and larger quantity orders for multiple sports teams.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Department Banner Materials for Indoor & Outdoor Sports Installations

Six Customizable Banner Materials

Your athletic department banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that showcase your team colors with pride. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your athletic department banner needs to be precise for specific mounting hardware, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular athletic banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut perfect for displaying team colors and logos in gymnasiums and indoor facilities.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine that produces vibrant, crisp team colors and graphics to give your athletic displays a high-end look in any lighting.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material for athletic installations. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality ideal for outdoor stadium use.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim allowing 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor athletic facilities and windy stadium conditions.

Fabric Banners

Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor athletic displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel perfect for championship banners.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors for athletic facility signage, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.

Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces in athletic facilities.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Banner Finishing Options for Gymnasium Mounting

Athletic Department Banner Finishing Options

Hems & Grommets Reinforced Hems Reinforced Corners Pole Pockets
These are a one inch fold, heat-welded hem with grommets typically added every 2–4 feet for secure gymnasium mounting. A thick, weblike material is heat-welded to the perimeter to provide additional reinforcement for long-term athletic facility display. A triangular piece of vinyl is applied to improve strength and durability in the corners for athletic installations. A sleeve added to allow for a dowel or pole to run through for suspended championship banner display.

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of the athletic banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all athletic department banners to increase durability during gymnasium installation and long-term display.

You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets for your athletic department banners:

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for athletic department banners mounted horizontally in gymnasiums.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides of the athletic banner will be heat welded and grommeted for maximum durability.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the athletic department banner.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter for lightweight athletic displays
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter for standard gymnasium mounting
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter for heavy-duty athletic installations

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your athletic department banner.

Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength for athletic banners and are grommeted to each corner for secure gymnasium mounting.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of athletic department banners for long-term facility display.

You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.

Double-Sided Athletic Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided athletic department banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes for gymnasium installations require a custom quote.

To learn more, visit our vinyl banner finishing options page.

We do not recommend wind slits in athletic department banners. For more information, visit our wind slit banners page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Department Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for athletic departments to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your sports season timing, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows athletic departments to make the final decision on when banners are needed for games, ceremonies, or facility installations.

1 Business Day Priority:

Athletic season timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option for urgent team recognition needs.

  • Athletic banner orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available for athletic events. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once team artwork upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your athletic department banners quickly for upcoming games or events? The express option is ideal.

  • Athletic banner orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available for sports events. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once team graphics upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option for athletic departments. Free and speedy for most custom athletic banner orders.

  • Athletic banner orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available for athletic events. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once team artwork upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.

5 Business Days Saver:

If your athletic department isn't in a rush, you can save money by choosing our 5-Day Saver option for off-season banner preparation.

  • Athletic banner orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available for sports events. Please contact customer service for more information.
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts once team graphics upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Department Banner Payment & Ordering Options

Payment

All athletic department banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your athletic banner order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your athletic department banner order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Athletic Department Banner Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping athletic department banners, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your athletic banner order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your athletic department banner package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the athletic banner package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders for multiple sports teams.

After athletic department banners have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the athletic banner is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International Shipping Notes:

For international shipments of athletic department banners, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Shipping Maps

Vinyl Athletic Banners & Mesh Athletic Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial based on customer location and athletic banner specifications.

Fabric Athletic Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods for athletic department banners:

Standard (3–5 Business Days)
Three Day (3 Business Days)
Two Day (2 Business Days)
Overnight (1 Business Day)
UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping for athletic department banners, please add additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery to your athletic facility.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days depending on destination.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Department Banner Artwork Requirements for Team Graphics

Artwork Guidelines

The file that prints best for athletic department banners is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files with team logos and graphics. If you are unsure of the quality of your team artwork files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you optimize them for athletic banner printing.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your athletic department banner order for correct team information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your athletic banner artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof for your athletic banner, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your athletic department banner project is color critical for official team colors, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific athletic banner project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Order Custom Athletic Department Banners for Your Sports Program Today

Custom athletic department banners are a great way to promote your school's athletics and build team pride throughout your facility. Get banners with your team's name and logo to display at your school, field, arena, or anywhere else your teams are competing. Use banners to recognize playoff appearances, championships, individual and team accomplishments, and any other achievements you want to showcase with pride.

Athletic department banners are also perfect on game day for ticket sales, concessions, tailgating, and welcoming fans to your facility. We print custom full-color athletic banners up to 16 feet by 50 feet for athletic departments all over the U.S. Whether you need championship recognition banners, team roster displays, or facility branding, Banners.com has the expertise and quality materials to create banners that represent your athletic program with pride.

Why Choose Banners.com for Athletic Department Banners?

Customer Service
Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers experienced in athletic banner design.

Fast Turnaround
Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your athletic department banner order on your sports season schedule.

Quality Products
Our athletic banners are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology for vibrant team colors and durable gymnasium display.

Live Order Tracking
Track your athletic department banner order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color athletic department banners take your sports program to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, like quick delivery and gymnasium durability. Request a quote and start your athletic department banner design today.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Athletic Department Banner FAQ

What sizes are available for athletic department banners?
We offer athletic department banners ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', with custom sizes available for specific gymnasium installations and stadium displays.

What materials work best for indoor athletic facility banners?
For indoor gymnasium displays, we recommend 13 oz matte or gloss vinyl, or fabric banners for a premium appearance. These materials provide excellent color reproduction for team logos and graphics.

Can you print official team colors accurately?
Yes, our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate reproduction of official team colors. We recommend this service for athletic departments requiring precise color matching.

What finishing options work best for gymnasium mounting?
Hems and grommets are most popular for horizontal mounting, while pole pockets work well for suspended championship banner displays. Reinforced corners add durability for long-term installations.

How quickly can athletic department banners be produced?
We offer 1, 2, 3, or 5 business day production times to accommodate athletic season schedules and urgent event needs.

Do you offer design services for athletic banners?
Yes, our in-house graphic design team can help create professional athletic department banners using your team logos, photos, and specific requirements.

What file formats do you accept for team logos?
We prefer .eps files converted to outline, but also accept high-resolution .pdf or .jpg files. Our design team can help optimize your team artwork files if needed.

Can you create double-sided athletic banners?
Yes, we can finish double-sided athletic department banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.
